title: SimpleTexturePack-Create
description: The Mod"Create" 's expansion pack for Simple TexturePack
body:
This is a SimpleTexturePack-_Create_ Mod Extension

It brings vibrant textures to your Create machine factory,Has a wide range of version support，Some blocks and items have been optimized。



How To Use：

Start Minecraft,Press ESC, Options>Resource Packs>Open Pack Folder and copies the ".zip"flie to here,click the pack in "Available"Area and click Done,after a Loading interface，then you finished it

Notice:

1.The version before 1.15 will **NOT** supported,so the newly texture only update on the“1.15-1.20MainVersion”

2.The Extension must on the top of Main
Example：![This is right](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f34478f30074c5c75f5dcb07595a657af995d2c.png)

3.!To use the texture pack,you **must** install the mod "_Create_" and the Main pack first!!

   To install the Main pack,please visit:[CLICK HERE!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simple-texturepack)

   To install Mod:Create,please visit:[CLICK HERE!]([https://modrinth.com/mod/create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create))
